title: rosa gallica var. liostyla
intro: Rosa gallica var. liostyla is a variety of the historic English rose, known for its fragrant and delicate pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions and wounds due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Rosa gallica var. liostyla is also used to promote health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating menstrual cramps. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions, which are used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
